title: Boat Rental in Cabo Frio: 2026 Guide to Costs, Seasons & Tips
html:
Set off from Praia do Porto into the crystalline waters of Cabo Frio, where a boat hire opens up the Costa do Sol. With half-day motorboat rentals starting from 150 USD, you can explore secluded coves and turquoise lagoons. BoatHire24 offers a straightforward way to book local vessels and compare verified boat listings directly online.

Where to set off in Cabo Frio

The most convenient departure point is the Marina Porto do Forno, close to the town centre and with easy parking. Other options include the pier at Praia das Conchas, the sheltered bay of Ilha do Japonês, and the fishing harbour at Praia do Peró. For longer trips, the anchorage at Ilha do Papagaio is a popular stop, about 3 nautical miles offshore. The neighbouring town of Búzios, 30 minutes by road, also offers charter bases at Marina Búzios. Each location provides direct access to the calm, clear waters of the Atlantic. You can compare verified boat listings in a few minutes.

Which boat to rent

  1. Speedboat, Best for a fast trip to nearby islands, seats up to 6 guests, from 150 USD for a half-day.
  2. Catamaran, Ideal for group day trips with spacious decks, for up to 12 guests, from 450 USD for a full day.
  3. Sailing yacht, Perfect for a relaxed cruise with a touch of adventure, for 4, 8 guests, from 300 USD for a half-day.
  4. Motor yacht (Azimut 40), A luxury option for families or corporate outings, for up to 10 guests, from 800 USD for a full-day charter.
  5. RIB, Great for water sports enthusiasts, seats up to 8 guests, from 200 USD for a short excursion. For more details on the Olympic 490 speedboat, check the Olympic 490 for hire page on BoatHire24.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Cabo Frio?

Costs vary by boat type, duration, and season, with half-day rentals starting from 150 USD. A shared tour on a schooner costs from 40 USD per person and lasts about 3 hours. A small motorboat for a half-day (4 hours) is available from 150 USD. A catamaran for a full-day (8 hours) costs from 450 USD. A crewed yacht with skipper can be booked from 700 USD per day. Peak season (December to March) sees prices rise by roughly 20 per cent, so it pays to book early. You can compare verified boat listings for the best rates. One option worth a look is the Olympic 490 for hire.

When is the best season to rent a boat?

The best season is between December and March, when the weather is warm and seas are calm. The prevailing wind is the Northeast Trade Wind, which is gentle most days. From June to August, winter can bring cooler temperatures and occasional southerly swells, but sailing remains possible. One local tip:

If you want to avoid crowds and still enjoy good weather, consider visiting in late September or October, when the water is still warm and the marina is quieter.
If you own a boat, you can rent out your boat and earn from spare days.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Cabo Frio?

For boats under 20 horsepower, no licence is required; for larger boats, a valid skipper licence is necessary. Brazil accepts certain international licences, but you must confirm with the operator. The specific requirements vary by boat size and engine power. The boat owner on BoatHire24 will state exactly what is needed before you book. Always check the booking FAQ for details on documentation. To see how booking works, visit the booking FAQ.

At a glance

  • Price band: 40 USD (shared tour) to 800 USD (crewedyacht)
  • Peak months: December to March
  • Trip length: 3 to 8 hours
  • Max capacity: 2 to 12 guests
  • Currency: USD
  • Licence: Not required for small engines; operator confirms exact rules

Questions about boat rental in Cabo Frio

Can I rent a boat in Cabo Frio without a licence?

Yes, you can rent a small motorboat or RIB without a licence as long as the engine is under 20 hp, which is common for short excursions.

What is the best boat for a family day out in Cabo Frio?

A catamaran is an excellent choice for families, offering stable decks, shade, and space for children to move around safely.

How far is Ilha do Papagaio from Cabo Frio?

Ilha do Papagaio lies about 3 nautical miles from the main marina, a 20-minute motorboat ride across the bay.

Are there any hidden fees when booking a boat in Cabo Frio?

Most listings on BoatHire24 include fuel, skipper, and basic insurance, but extras like food or water sports gear are usually charged separately and listed in the booking FAQ.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Cabo Frio or list your own. If you own a vessel and want to earn revenue, you can rent out your boat on BoatHire24 and reach a global audience of travellers for 2026 and beyond.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Cabo Frio and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
